author: potuz
content: Hello pandas, what would be an effective path to test attestation deadline at 2 seconds instead of 3?

author: barnabasbusa
content: all of these are exposed under network_params in kurtosis

author: barnabasbusa
content: you will have to change everything else too, as everything is % point now

author: barnabasbusa
content: dependent on what you want for the other values, adjust `attestation_due_bps_gloas: 1666` and increase the aggregate or whatever else

author: potuz
content:
Testing in these single server devnets it's a first step but only to find out if we're screwed from the start.

<@654267572107083777> the broadcast time up to the attestation deadline becomes effectively useless time of the slot in ePBS. By lowering it we can lower the payload timelines check. Guaranteeing the same execution/proving time without removing the Payload broadcast time. This also allows us to squeeze more from timing games and also reduces the UX deficit of delaying tx inclusion for the time between CL block availability and EL block availability

author: barnabasbusa
content: Do we wanna touch changing these times in gloas? I'd actually hold off and just leave everything as is, and iterate further on slot restructuring in the following fork. I'm a bit afraid that we won't have too much gain unless we shorten the slot time

author: parithosh
content: i think potuz isnt proposing changing the slot time but just when the attestation deadline occurs at

author: parithosh
content: to reduce dead time in the slot
